ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year of the student */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Grade point average of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the student */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the student's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was founded */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student president */,
  "vice_president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student vice president */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty advisor */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the organization's logo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the organization's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_vice_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("vice_president_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the student joined the organization */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the membership */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the student left the organization */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memberships_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memberships_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization undertaking the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "spending" TEXT /* Amount spent on the project */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty supervisor */,
  "project_documents" TEXT /* URL or path to project-related documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities of the role */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_roles_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_roles_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_roles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student responsible for the task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the student who assigned the task */,
  "task_documents" TEXT /* URL or path to task-related documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "progress_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the task completed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the progress */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked on the task */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* Milestones achieved during the progress update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_progress_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization organizing the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "expected_attendance" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  "event_documents" TEXT /* URL or path to event-related documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the student */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the student registered for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was purchased */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance is due for the resource */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Name of the vendor who supplied the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization using the resource */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the usage */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the resource was used */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization making the announcement */,
  "announcement_title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the announcement was made */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the announcement */,
  "posted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the student or faculty member who posted the announcement */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_posted_by FOREIGN KEY ("posted_by") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the student */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)
